log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Astral Elf — Iron Concentration --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:1+4=5 vs DC 15] FAIL!
→ 1/1 targets affected.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18 | Cond: [charmed_hp, incapacitated]
** INCAPACITATED ** Cannot take actions.

══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Astral Elf — Iron Concentration (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Astral Elf — Iron Concentration
→ Bite: [d20:4+10=14 vs AC 14] HIT! 20 damage. Astral Elf — Iron Concentration HP: 47/67
→ Bite: [d20:13+10=23 vs AC 14] HIT! 16 damage. Astral Elf — Iron Concentration HP: 31/67
→ Bite: [d20:8+10=18 vs AC 14] HIT! 17 damage. Astral Elf — Iron Concentration HP: 14/67
--- Astral Elf — Iron Concentration --- HP: 14/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: HP CRITICAL (14/67). Going invisible for survival.
ACTION: Cast Greater Invisibility (Level 4 slot, 1 remaining).
→ Astral Elf — Iron Concentration is affected by Greater Invisibility.
